creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hi Sergey,

Unfortunately the patch wont work on my machine, since I have the following in my /etc/make.conf:

WITH_OPENSSL_PORT=yes
OPENSSL_PORT=security/libressl

I can ofcourse remove libressl, recompile all my ports and hope everything still works. But that's going to cost me a lot more time than I'm willing to spend on this right now. (I have the flu, so not feeling very well).

I do think patch will work for most people though, but if they have a similar setup, they will run into problems. Especially since security/openssl conflicts with security/libressl.

Best regards,
Ralf
